![Image 5: 2021 Golden Kitty Awards](https://ph-static.imgix.net/badges/GoldenKittySmall.svg?auto=compress&codec=mozjpeg&cs=strip&auto=format&w=33&h=36&fit=max&frame=1)[Visit website](https://www.fathom.ai/?utm_campaign=directories&utm_source=producthunt&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=mainlisting&ref=producthunt)

[Meeting software](https://producthunt.com/categories/meetings)

•

[AI notetakers](https://producthunt.com/categories/ai-meeting-notetakers)

Fathom captures your meetings your way — bot or bot-free, on any call. Ask questions across your entire meeting history and get instant, cited answers. Connect your intelligence to Claude, ChatGPT, your CRM, and more. Desktop, mobile, and in-person. The real value of meetings isn't the notes. It's the knowledge inside them. #1 AI Notetaker on G2. Works with Zoom, Meet, and Teams.
